help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Find answers to frequently asked questions

contact.title: Contact Support
contact.description: Get in touch with our team

0.question: How do I verify a certificate?
0.answer: You can verify a certificate by entering the certificate number or national ID on our verification page. The system will instantly show you the certificate details and validity status.

1.question: How long does it take to issue a certificate?
1.answer: Certificate issuance is typically instant once all required approvals are obtained. The approval process may vary depending on your institution's settings and partner requirements.

2.question: Can I download certificates in bulk?
2.answer: Yes, institutions can download multiple certificates at once using our bulk download feature available in the certificate management panel.

3.question: What security measures are in place?
3.answer: We use bank-level encryption, blockchain technology for certificate verification, and comply with international data protection standards including GDPR and KVKK.

4.question: How do I become a partner institution?
4.answer: You can register as an institution through our registration page. After verification, you'll have access to all certificate management features.

5.question: What payment methods do you accept?
5.answer: We accept various payment methods including credit cards, bank transfers, and institutional invoicing. Contact us for enterprise payment options.

contactCta.title: Still have questions?
contactCta.subtitle: Our support team is ready to help you

verification.title: Instant Verification
verification.description: Recipients and employers can verify certificates in seconds using certificate verify code. All verifications are logged and tracked for security.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: This Privacy Policy explains how Mert CIN Certificate Authorisation collects, uses, and protects your personal information. We are committed to ensuring your privacy and protecting your data.

dataCollection.title: Data We Collect
dataCollection.content: We collect the following types of information:

items.0: Personal identification information (name, email, phone number)
items.3: Technical information (IP address, browser type, device information)

dataUsage.title: How We Use Your Data
dataUsage.content: Your data is used to provide and improve our services, process certificates, communicate with you, and ensure platform security. We never sell your personal information to third parties.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, secure servers, and regular security audits to protect your information from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.

userRights.title: Your Rights
userRights.content: You have the right to access, correct, delete, or export your personal data. You can also object to certain data processing activities. Contact us to exercise these rights.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using this platform, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

services.title: Description of Services
services.content: Mert CIN Certificate Authorisation provides a digital platform for certificate issuance, verification, and management. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue services at any time.

items.0: Maintaining the confidentiality of their account credentials
items.1: Ensuring the accuracy of information provided
items.2: Complying with all applicable laws and regulations

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: All content, trademarks, and intellectual property on this platform are owned by Mert CIN Certificate Authorisation or its licensors. Unauthorized use is prohibited.

limitation.title: Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: We strive to provide accurate and reliable services, but we cannot guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation. Our liability is limited to the maximum extent permitted by law.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.content: For questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us at

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: This notice explains how we process your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and other applicable data protection laws.

dataController.title: Data Controller
dataController.content: Mert CIN Certificate Authorisation is the data controller responsible for your personal data. We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring compliance with data protection regulations.

personalData.title: Personal Data We Process
personalData.content: We process the following categories of personal data:

items.0: Identity data (name, surname, national ID number)
items.1: Contact data (email address, phone number, address)
items.3: Technical data (IP address, login data, usage information)

processingPurpose.title: Purpose of Processing
processingPurpose.content: Your personal data is processed for certificate issuance and verification, service provision, legal compliance, and platform improvement. We only process data for legitimate purposes with appropriate legal basis.

dataSubjectRights.title: Your Rights as a Data Subject
dataSubjectRights.content: Under GDPR, you have the following rights:

items.0: Right to access your personal data
items.1: Right to rectification of inaccurate data
items.2: Right to erasure (right to be forgotten)

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: To exercise your rights or for any questions regarding data processing, please contact us at
